title: cajanus reticulatus var. grandifolius
intro: Cajanus reticulatus var. grandifolius, also known as the large-leaved pigeon pea, is a plant species in the legume family that is native to tropical Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, and is used to treat various health conditions such as fever, digestive issues, and skin problems. The health benefits of Cajanus reticulatus var. grandifolius include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system, while its leaves and seeds can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for medicinal purposes. Additionally, the plant's seeds are also used to prepare a powder or paste for topical application to treat skin conditions and wounds.
